title: Ampliglossum fuscans
intro: I couldn't find any information about the plant 'Ampliglossum fuscans'.
taxonomy: Ampliglossum fuscans is a species of orchid native to Australia. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae, which includes over 30,000 species of orchids. The genus Ampliglossum, to which Ampliglossum fuscans belongs, is a small group of orchids, with only a few species identified. The species is further classified as a terrestrial orchid, meaning it grows in the ground rather than epiphytically. Ampliglossum fuscans is considered an endemic species, meaning it is found only in the wild in a specific geographical area.
